contact.addressBody: Serving Mecca and nearby areas by arrangement.

faq.sectionLead: Quick answers about cleaning services in Mecca.

items.q: Do you cover all of Mecca?
items.a: Yes—we serve Makkah including districts near Al Haram, Al Aziziyah, Al Shawqiyah, and more by arrangement.

items.q: How long does an apartment or villa cleaning take?
items.a: It depends on size and service type (standard vs deep). WhatsApp your rooms, kitchen, and property type for a quick estimate.

items.q: Are your products safe for kids and sensitivities?
items.a: We use household-appropriate cleaning materials and can discuss gentler options on request.

items.q: Is there a guarantee or follow-up?
items.a: We work to clear standards—if something needs attention after the visit, contact us and we’ll address it quickly.

items.q: Do you offer deep cleaning before move-in or after painting?
items.a: Yes—kitchens, bathrooms, floors, and glass depending on the condition of the property.
Fastest: WhatsApp your district, service type, and preferred date—or call us directly.

items.q: Do you offer contracts for offices?
items.a: Yes—recurring visits for offices and retail spaces in Makkah based on your schedule.
